use_cases: Display real-time cryptocurrency prices and market capitalization for major coins
Track portfolio performance with 24h price change indicators and sparkline charts
Compare different cryptocurrencies by market cap rank and trading volume
Monitor market trends with visual sparkline data spanning multiple time periods
Provide quick access to high/low 24h price data for trading decisions
ai_summary: A cryptocurrency dashboard component that displays live prices, market capitalization, and percentage changes for top cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and BNB. Features animated sparkline charts for 7-day price trends, formatted price displays adapting to different decimal precision, and market cap formatting with T/B/M suffixes. Uses Framer Motion for smooth animations and includes hover interactions for enhanced data visualization.
